briefdescription.para: < Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Size of each hdcp 1.4 Public Key in bytes.
Maximum depth that the Repeater can support on the downstream interface.
Maximum devices that can be cascaded to the Repeater.
Alternative name for the function to set callback for HDCP functions.
Used to remove warnings for unused variables.
Adds extra functions for additional debugging.
This enumerates the State Types for HDCP Receiver state machine.
This enumerates the Event Types for HDCP Transmitter state machine.
These constants are used to identify callback functions.
This enumerates the call back for the HDCP Repeater Tx state machine.
These constants are used to identify fields inside the topology structure.
This typedef defines the callback interface that is to be used for interrupts within this driver.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for debug print statements within this driver.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for debug log message statements within this driver.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* XHdcp1x_RunDdcHandler)(u8 DeviceAddress, u16 ByteCount, u8 *BufferPtr, u8 Stop, void *RefPtr)
memberdef.argsstring: )(u8 DeviceAddress, u16 ByteCount, u8 *BufferPtr, u8 Stop, void *RefPtr)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_RunDdcHandler

briefdescription.para: Callback type used for calling DDC read and write functions.

parameterdescription.para: is the (i2c) device address of the HDCP port.
is the amount of data bytes in the buffer to read or write.
is a pointer to a buffer that is used for reading or writing.
is a flag to control if a stop token is set or not.
is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the DDC reading and writing functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS The read action was successful.

briefdescription.para: This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for setting the DDC handler for HDMI implementation of HDCP functionality over HDMI within this driver.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used to get the DDC handler for implementation of HDCP functionality over HDMI within this driver.
This typedef defines a memory to store a Key Selection Vector (KSV)
This typedef contains an instance of the HDCP port.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for starting a one shot timer on behalf of an HDCP interface within the underlying platform.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for stopping a timer on behalf of an HDCP interface.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for performing a busy delay on behalf of an HDCP interface.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* XHdcp1x_KsvRevokeCheck)(const XHdcp1x *InstancePtr, u64 Ksv)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_KsvRevokeCheck

briefdescription.para: This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for checking a specific KSV against the platforms revocation list.
This function returns a reference to an XHdcp1x_Config structure based on specified device ID.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the HDCP interface.

simplesect.para: A reference to the config record in the configuration table (in xhdcp_g.c) corresponding the specified DeviceId. NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the configuration for this HDCP instance and fills in the InstancePtr->Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is the device whose adaptor is to be determined.
is the configuration of the instance.
is pointer to the underlying physical interface.
is the device base address in the virtual memory space. If the address translation is not used, then the physical address is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function self tests an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to test.

briefdescription.para: This function polls an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to poll.

briefdescription.para: This function posts a DOWNSTREAMREADY event to an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to reset.

briefdescription.para: This function copies the V'H0, V'H1, V'H2, V'H3, V'H4, KSVList and BInfo values in the HDCP RX HDCP Instance for Repeater validation .

parameterdescription.para: is the receiver instance.
is the Repeater information in the transmitter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Repeater functionality for an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to disable.
is either TRUE or FALSE

briefdescription.para: This function resets an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to reset.

briefdescription.para: This function enables an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to enable.

briefdescription.para: This function disables an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to disable.

briefdescription.para: This function updates the state of the underlying physical interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to update.
indicates the state of the underlying physical interface.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the lane count of a hdcp interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to update.
is the lane count.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the MST/ SST of a hdcp interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to update.
determines the MST/ SST configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates authentication of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to initiate authentication on.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates downstream read of READY bit and consequently the second part of Repeater authentication.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to initiate authentication on.

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if authentication is in progress.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to query.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authentication in progress (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if it has successfully completed authentication.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to query.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if it is in the state of computations or not.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to query.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if it is in the wait-for-ready state or not.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to query.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries the device connected to the downstream interface to determine if it supports hdcp or not.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to query.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating HDCP capability (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if it is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to query.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating enabled (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current encryption map of the video streams traversing an hdcp interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to query.

briefdescription.para: This function determines if the video stream is encrypted.

detaileddescription.para: The traffic is encrypted if the encryption bit map is non-zero and the interface is authenticated.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating encrypted (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function enables encryption on a series of streams within an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to configure.
is the stream map to enable encryption on.

briefdescription.para: This function disables encryption on a series of streams within an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to configure.
is the stream map to disable encryption on.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the key selection vector that is to be used by the HDCP cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to configure.
is the key selection vector.

briefdescription.para: This function enables an HDCP MST ECF Field.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to enable.
is the time slots to be enabled for ECF.

briefdescription.para: This function handles a timeout on an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function installs callback functions for the given HandlerType.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP core instance.
specifies the type of handler.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function is the cipher interrupt handler for the HDCP module.

parameterdescription.para: is the device instance that just interrupted.

simplesect.para: This function just forwards the interrupt along to the corresponding cipher core.

briefdescription.para: This function is the port interrupt handler for the HDCP module.

parameterdescription.para: is the device instance that just interrupted.
is the interrupt cause bit map.

simplesect.para: This function just forwards the interrupt along to the corresponding cipher core.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the debug printf function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the printf function.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the debug log message function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the debug logging function.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the KSV revocation list check function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the KSV revocation list check function.

briefdescription.para: This function sets timer start function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the HDCP interface.
is the timer start function.

briefdescription.para: This function sets timer stop function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the HDCP interface.
is the timer stop function.

briefdescription.para: This function sets timer busy delay function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the HDCP interface.
is the timer busy delay function.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the version of the HDCP driver software.
This function retrieves the cipher version of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to query.

simplesect.para: The cipher version used by the interface

briefdescription.para: This function performs a debug display of an HDCP instance.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to display.

briefdescription.para: This function processes the AKsv.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to display.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a pointer to the downstream Topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the XHdcp14 Topology structure or NULL when the topology info is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the blank output for the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the blank output for the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set various fields inside the topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.
indicates what field of the topology structure to update.
is the value assigned to the field of the topology structure.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get various fields inside the topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.
indicates what field of the topology structure to update.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of KSV List read in the downstream interface of the repeater topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

listitem.para: List of KSVs of the downstream devices

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of KSV of the device attached to the downstream interface of the repeater.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function return if the HDCP interface is a repeater in case of Rx or is connected to a repeater in case of Tx.

parameterdescription.para: is the transmitter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the RepeaterInfo value int the HDCP RX instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is a pointer to the Repeater Info value(s).

briefdescription.para: This function sets the KSVList value(s) in the HDCP RX KSV Fifo register space for the upstream interface to read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is a pointer to the KSV list.
is the number of KSVs in the list.

briefdescription.para: This function does the necessary actions to update HDCP after the topology has been set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function set the HDMI_MODE in the BStatus register of the HDMI DDC space.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is the truth-value.
